name: resume-builder
description: AI-powered resume builder with job discovery, dual ATS + HR scoring, cover letter generation, and Workday-compatible DOCX output.

interface.shortDescription: Tailor resumes, write cover letters, score job fit, and generate DOCX applications
interface.longDescription: Resume Builder helps Codex discover matching jobs, score fit against a master resume, tailor resumes to job descriptions, write cover letters, generate ATS-friendly DOCX files, and update an application tracker.
defaultPrompt: Use Resume Builder to tailor my resume to this job description.
Use Resume Builder to score this job description against my master resume.
Use Resume Builder to find jobs that fit my resume.
